comment.body: Everyone knows Trump going to introduce tariffs tonight and the market is in a very extreme sentiment position leading many to believe that market must rally once news is out. But the event itself is a once in a century event. Last time USA increased tariffs like this is 90 years ago. So sentiment measures which worked in recent past may not work in what is an extreme scenario
